issue_summary: Remove explicit field array Rework resolve
javadoc_before:
/** * TimeOfDay is an immutable partial instant supporting the hour, minute, second * and millisecond fields. *

* Each individual field can be queried in two ways: *

    *
  • getHourOfDay() *
  • hourOfDay().get() *
* The second technique also provides access to other useful methods on the * field: *
    *
  • numeric value *
  • text value *
  • short text value *
  • maximum value *
  • minimum value *
*

* TimeOfDay is thread-safe and immutable, provided that the Chronology is as well. * All standard Chronology classes supplied are thread-safe and immutable. * * @author Stephen Colebourne * @author Brian S O'Neill * @since 1.0 */
javadoc_after:
/** * TimeOfDay is an immutable partial instant supporting the hour, minute, second * and millisecond fields. *

* Calculations on TimeOfDay are performed using a {@link Chronology}. * This chronology is set to be in the UTC time zone for all calculations. *

* Each individual field can be queried in two ways: *

    *
  • getHourOfDay() *
  • hourOfDay().get() *
* The second technique also provides access to other useful methods on the * field: *
    *
  • numeric value *
  • text value *
  • short text value *
  • maximum value *
  • minimum value *
*

* TimeOfDay is thread-safe and immutable, provided that the Chronology is as well. * All standard Chronology classes supplied are thread-safe and immutable. * * @author Stephen Colebourne * @author Brian S O'Neill * @since 1.0 */
